MissionTypes:k16la1KmlUqWM7Wky1Trhg

labelUnknown Data: Part 2 (0-0)
titleUnknown Data: Part 2
descriptionJahaar successfully extrapolated the data stream and discovered how to unlock hidden information embedded inside data chips. Unfortunately these data chips degrade fast. Take this algorithm and use it to decrypt and copy the data on a chip before it has time to decay. You must go and obtain a new simple data chip and decode it.
availableYes
